name: SHORT EXPIRY  CLEARANCE: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Canned - Chicken Chunks inGravy 400g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Reflex Plus Chicken Adult Cat Food provides complete and balanced nutrition with tender chicken protein, supporting muscle strength, digestion, and overall wellness in adult cats.
description: Reflex Plus Chicken Adult Cat Canned Food ,?fully-balanced, chicken protein-containing cat food?carefully formulated by?cat / dog?nutritionists?to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 6.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 3.5 Crude Fiber (%) -?0.5 Moisture (%) -?82 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin A (Min) -?1400 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) -?180 IE/kg Iron -?8 mg/kg Copper -?1.2 mg/kg Iodine -?0.21 mg/kg Manganese -?1.6 mg/kg Zinc -?8.0 mg/kg Selenium -?0.02 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: ?Meat & Animal Derivatives (Chicken 4% min.), Cereals, Fish and Fish Derivatives, Minerals, Veg. Protein Extracts, Preservers and Colourants. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day, where 1 can serves 2 meals. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
